baseline.subject: Add Mira Core Phase 44 runtime mode flag reader safety validation
baseline.baseline_boundary: Phases 1-44 are committed as local read-only, proposal-only, or validation-only Mira Core artifacts. No UI implementation, browser/window/capture access, runtime, server, listener, route, network, database, store, file migration, queue, lease, auth, key, secret, env read, config read, flag read, local execution, shell, PTY, control execution, reporting sink, send, deploy, trade, output-file, durable memory/profile commit, export, delete, restore, or raw-content storage behavior exists at this baseline.

purpose: Define the fixture-only kill-switch wiring safety boundary before any future kill-switch wiring implementation can be proposed.
Pin phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry coverage through Phases 1-44.
Record that the Phase44 Tier0 recommendation phase45-runtime-mode-flag-reader-safety-validator is satisfied by b6fd5b8 and must not be repeated as open work.
Select Phase44 Tier1 recommendation phase45-kill-switch-wiring-safety-contract as fixture-only work.
Preserve Phase35 through Phase44 as current validation truth while keeping stale Phase13, Phase23, and Phase31 truth intact.
Keep runtime mode disabled/default-off, local/dev-only, reference-only, unimplemented, flagReader=false, flagReadNow=false, and non-authorizing.
Keep env/config/flag reads absent now: envRead=false, configRead=false, flagReadNow=false, secretMaterialRead=false, rawConfigExport=false.
Keep kill switch visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, killWired=false, liveCheck=false, and non-authorizing.
Keep runtime-mode-flag and live-kill-switch prerequisite/status gaps unsatisfied, blocking runtime/dry-run now, reference-only, and non-authorizing.
Keep the future kill-switch wiring slice blocked now and explicitly non-authorizing.
nonGoals: No browser, window, screenshot, OCR, or capture access.
No runtime implementation or runtime start.
No runtime mode flag reader implementation or flag read.
No env read, config read, process.env read, secret read, config path read, or raw config export.
No kill-switch wiring, execution, live check, control action, bypass path, allow-open behavior, or live fail-closed probe.
No rollback execution, reporting sink, store, queue, lease, or output-file behavior.
No server, listener, route, HTTP, WebSocket, or network behavior.
No database, store, file migration, auth, token, session, signing, key, encryption, KMS, env secret, or secret material behavior.
No local execution, shell, PTY, send, deploy, trade, financial action, export, delete, restore, memory/profile commit, or raw-content storage behavior.

No claim that kill-switch wiring safety labels, flag-reader safety labels, implementation-risk labels, prerequisite labels, runtime mode status, kill-switch status, status/gap records, socket connection, delivery acceptance, commit status, or this fixture proves runtime availability, model processing, bridge green, local-arm execution, control execution, flag reading, kill-switch wiring, or runner execution.
forbiddenOutputSubstrings: kill switch wiring safety authorizes runtime
kill switch wiring safety authorizes execution
kill switch wiring safety authorizes kill switch
flag reader safety authorizes kill switch

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.action: implement validation-only kill-switch wiring safety report against this fixture
nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.why_safe: data-only safety validation for committed Phases 1-44; no module beyond validator/report, no UI rendering, browser/window/capture, runtime, network, store, queue, lease, control execution, reporting sink, send, deploy, trade, env read, config read, flag read, kill-switch wiring, live check, bypass, allow-open, or output-file behavior

nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.action: create fixture-only kill-switch wiring readiness-gap contract after the Phase45 validator is green
nextRecommendationExpectedCandidates.why_safe: contract-only gap refresh that keeps runtime mode disabled, flagReader=false, flagReadNow=false, no env/config/flag reads, kill switch unwired, no live check, runtime/dry-run unavailable, all side effects blocked, and proof boundaries false before implementation scope is considered

summaryCriteria: Fixture remains the only Phase45 file created by Oracle.
JSON.parse succeeds.
Phase inventory, schema registry, and CLI registry requirements cover exactly Phases 1-44.
Commit chain contains Phase 1-13 package plus Phase 14-44 scoped commits and ends at b6fd5b8.
Source recommendation phase45-kill-switch-wiring-safety-contract is selected as Tier1 fixture-only work.
Phase44 Tier0 recommendation phase45-runtime-mode-flag-reader-safety-validator is satisfied by b6fd5b8 and not reopened.
Phase35 through Phase44 are current; stale Phase13, Phase23, and Phase31 truth is preserved.
Phase34 prior recommendations remain satisfied and not reopened.
Source refs include Phase26, Phase27, Phase29, Phase30, Phase32, Phase33, Phase37, Phase38, Phase39, Phase40, Phase41, Phase42, Phase43, and Phase44 artifacts.
Runtime mode boundary remains disabled, local/dev only, reference-only, unimplemented, no flag reader/read, and non-authorizing.
Flag-reader and env/config boundaries remain no-reader, no env/config/process.env/secret/raw config read, and non-authorizing.
Kill-switch boundary remains visible, fail-closed, reference-only, unwired, unimplemented, no live check, and non-authorizing.
Kill-switch wiring boundary remains contract-only, blocked, reference-only, unwired, no live check, no bypass, no allow-open, no control execution, no reporting sink, and non-authorizing.
Prerequisite gap matrix includes exactly runtime mode flag implementation and live kill-switch wiring, both unsatisfied, blocking runtime/dry-run now, and non-authorizing.
Risk register includes eight blocking/non-authorizing kill-switch wiring risks.
Blocked future slices include live kill-switch wiring, runtime mode flag reader, control-path execution, and reporting sink write.

Capability and proof boundaries keep runtimeStarted=false, runnerExecuted=false, runtimeAvailable=false, killSwitchWiringAvailable=false, killSwitchLiveCheckAvailable=false, serverCanExecuteLocal=false, serverCanProveModelProcessing=false, direct Builder/Oracle targets blocked, and proof boundaries false.

All side-effect truth fields preserve no module/CLI/test implementation, UI/runtime/server/listener/network/db/store/file migration/queue/lease/auth/key/secret/env-read/config-read/flag-read/local execution/shell/PTY/browser/window/capture/control execution/reporting sink/send/deploy/trade/kill-switch-wiring/live-check/output-file behavior.

Next recommendations are Tier0/Tier1 only, non-authorizing, and do not recommend live UI, browser/window/capture access, live runtime, customer send, deploy, trade, output files, store writes, queue/lease creation, env/config/flag reads, control execution, reporting sink, kill-switch wiring, live check, or local execution.
